text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Zenno Rob Roy and
Matikanetannhauser in the cafeteria kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In the story, they made it with a sparkling,
prismatic carrot they found at the end of a
rainbow.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow! A rainbow, huh? I hope we'll be able to find
one in time.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Finding a rainbow is one thing, but I don't think
carrots that sparkle in multiple colors actually
exist...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It may be prudent to brainstorm some substitutes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Like a bunch of carrots that are different colors?
We could find some yellow and purple carrots,
but... Hmm... That sounds really hard too.
choice_data_list: What are you trying to make, exactly?
What are you trying to make, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, um... We're trying to recreate the
rainbow-colored carrot cake from one of the
books I read recently.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The story is about three chefs who go on journeys
in a food truck and cook in all kinds of different
places.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
At the end of their adventure, they create a cake
with all the ingredients they've obtained, and it
just sounded so gorgeous and delicious!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure recreating a fantasy cuisine will be quite
difficult, but I'd still like to give it a try and feel
what it's like to be in that world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Adventure, exploration, and discovery! El is back
and at your service!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy! Look, look! I got all the ingredients we
need to make the twilight-infused void cream!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I got us 99% cocoa powder, charcoal powder,
and squid ink paste to top it all off!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, El! Let's try making the void
cream right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They start improvising their way through the
whole cake recipe, until...

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Finished!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Perfecto! We totally nailed the pure-black
decorations!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I think so too! Now to cut the cake! If we did
it right, the cross section should be separated
into pretty rainbow-colored layers!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! What happened?! Why is the inside a
marbly mess?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ewww! And what's that green stuff oozing out
from between each layer?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... That's right! I remember reading in a
cookbook that the anthocyanin in purple food
coloring has a tendency to change colors!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I should've looked up how to make sure the colors
don't mix together...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, you two... I wasn't prepared enough.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! It's normal to mess up the first time you
try something. Let's just try again!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Así es! My papa taught me that the strong learn
from their failures!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, thanks, guys!
choice_data_list: You have some really good friends.
You have some really good friends.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I truly do... I would've been crushed by my failure
if I were alone.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: But we were successful, in a way, weren't we? We recreated the three chefs sharing a special experience together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! This cake might not be a looker, but it
sure is delicious!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Hey, no fair! I want some too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: W-wait, I want to try it as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them happily share the cake. It
seems the time they spent working on it together
made it even more tasty.
